zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Fiske於1593年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德時，他的父親Nathaniel Fiske18歲，母親Abria or alice Hovel16歲。他於1612年與Dorothy Symonds在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年6月21日在他的家鄉享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathaniel Fiske于1593年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德时，他的父亲Nathaniel Fiske18岁，母亲Abria or alice Hovel16岁。他于1612年与Dorothy Symonds在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年6月21日在他的家乡享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Fiske was born in 1593, in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nathaniel Fiske, was 18 and his mother, Abria or alice Hovel, was 16. He married Dorothy Symonds in 1612, in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 June 1676, in his hometown, at the age of 83, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathaniel Fiske est né en 1593, à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nathaniel Fiske, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Abria or alice Hovel, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Symonds en 1612, à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juin 1676, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nathaniel Fiske 1593 in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nathaniel Fiske 18 und seine Mutter Abria or alice Hovel 16. Er hat 1612 in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Dorothy Symonds geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. ko.Saint Andrew's Church, Weybread, Mid Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Fiske(이)가 1593년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Fiske(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Abria or alice Hovel(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1612년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드에서 Dorothy Symonds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 6월 21일 그의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Fiske nasceu em 1593, em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nathaniel Fiske, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Abria or alice Hovel, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Symonds em 1612, em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Saint Andrew's Church, Weybread, Mid Suf: ст андрю'с чурч, вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Fiske родился в 1593 г. в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Fiske было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Abria or alice Hovel, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Symonds в 1612 г. в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 июня 1676 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
